description: Test that data import/export, HL7/FHIR transformations, and integrity checks are functioning correctly.
objective: To validate that data imported or exported through HL7/FHIR transformations is accurate and consistent with the source system.
prerequisites: HL7/FHIR transformation mappings are configured correctly
Source system is available and providing accurate data
test_steps: Step 1: Import sample data through HL7/FHIR transformation
Step 2: Verify that imported data is accurate and consistent with source system
Step 3: Export imported data to verify integrity of export process
Step 4: Compare exported data with original source data to ensure accuracy
expected_result: Data import/export, HL7/FHIR transformations, and integrity checks are functioning correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Data import/export process is successful without errors
HL7/FHIR transformations produce accurate and consistent results
Integrity checks detect any discrepancies or inconsistencies in data
